nasb.text: and are not like Moses, who used to put a veil over his face so that the sons of Israel would not look intently at the end of what was fading away.

esv.text: not like Moses, who would put a veil over his face so that the Israelites might not gaze at the outcome of what was being brought to an end.

cnv.text: 不像摩西那樣，把帕子蒙在臉上，使以色列人看不見那短暫的榮光的結局。

ccb.text: 不像摩西将帕子蒙在脸上，以免以色列人看见那渐渐消逝的荣光。

csbs.text: 我们不像摩西那样，他把帕子蒙在脸上，使以色列子民不能注视那渐渐消失的荣光的结局。
